'''''Star Wars Tales Volume 3''''' is the third trade paperback collection of the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. Volume 3 collects ''Star Wars Tales'' issues 9-12. It was released on [[February 26]], [[2003]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Collecting issues nine through twelve of the quarterly anthology smash sensation! ''Star Wars Tales'' Volume 3 features the thrilling Vader versus Maul story "Resurrection" as well as comics sensation Garth Ennis' take on the life of a stormtrooper in the riviting [sic] "Trooper". ''Tales'' has explored every corner of the ''Star Wars'' galaxy and kept readers coming back for more! Collected for the first time into one prestigious volume, ''Star Wars Tales'' Volume 3 is sure to delight fans both young and old!''

==Contents==
*''[[Star Wars Tales 9]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 10]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 12]]''
